description_long: This is a single right-hand glove designed for urban use, featuring a combination of synthetic fabric and reinforced textured materials. The glove has a predominantly dark gray and black color scheme, with lighter gray accents and blueish highlights along the fingers and wrist. The back of the glove displays a mesh-like pattern for breathability, as well as a visible EX3 brand patch. The palm side is reinforced with extra padding and textured grip zones, likely for enhanced durability and control. The glove includes a velcro closure strap at the wrist for a secure fit. Overall, the design suggests it is intended for activities requiring both protection and dexterity, such as cycling, motorcycling, or general work.
description: A dark gray and black urban glove with reinforced palm, mesh back, and a visible EX3 brand patch, featuring a velcro wrist closure and blueish highlights.
description_view_0: Side view showing the glove's profile, blueish finger accents, and the layered construction of the back and palm.
description_view_1: Palm view highlighting the textured grip zones, reinforced padding, and the glove's ergonomic finger design.
description_view_2: Opposite side view emphasizing the mesh back, blueish finger edges, and the wrist closure strap.
description_view_3: Back view displaying the EX3 brand patch, mesh ventilation, and the overall color pattern of the glove.
attribute_logo: Rectangular EX3 patch on the back of the glove
attribute_pattern: textured mesh and reinforced grip zones
